name: json response
func:
msg.payload = {
    sn: msg.payload.sn,
    version: 2,
    product: msg.payload.product,
    properties: {
        packNum: msg.payload.packNum,
        hyperTmp: (msg.payload.hyperTmp *10) + 2731,
        BatVolt: (msg.payload.batVolt * 100),
        chargeMaxLimit: msg.payload.chargeMaxLimit,
        inverseMaxPower: msg.payload.inverseMaxPower,
        socLimit: msg.payload.socLimit,
        acMode: msg.payload.acMode,
        packInputPower: msg.payload.packInputPower,
        outputPackPower: msg.payload.packOutputPower,
        rssi: msg.payload.rssi,
        gridInputPower: msg.payload.gridInputPower,
        outputHomePower: msg.payload.outputHomePower,
        socStatus: msg.payload.socStatus,
        inputLimit: msg.payload.inputLimit,
        outputLimit: msg.payload.outputLimit,
        electricLevel: msg.payload.electricLevel,
        remainOutTime: msg.payload.remainOutTime,
        minSoc: msg.payload.minSoc*10,
        socSet: msg.payload.socSet*10,
        is_error: msg.payload.is_error,
        gridOffPower: msg.payload.gridOffPower,
        solarInputPower: msg.payload.solarInputPower,
        pvStatus: msg.payload.pvStatus,
        pass: msg.payload.pass
    },

    packData: [
        msg.payload.batterij_1,
        msg.payload.batterij_2,
        msg.payload.batterij_3,
        msg.payload.batterij_4,
        msg.payload.batterij_5,
        msg.payload.batterij_6
    ].filter(Boolean) // filter alleen geldigde batterijen eruit
};

msg.statusCode = 200;
msg.headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json"
};

return msg;

name: power +/-
Hyper gegevens
Vul hier de juiste entiteiten in van je batterijen, breid eventueel uit met extra batterijen
Vul hier het serial number in van je Hyper
gridOffPower
pvStatus
Aanpassen batVolt als 0
